name: funding
instructions:
["Williamsburg North and Williamsburg South are the two high schools in the Williamsburg district. Each school has around the same number of students. Every year, each school tries to send as many of their graduating students as possible to a university. To encourage college admissions, the state uses the number of students sent to a university to determine how much funding their district’s education program will get for the year. If Williamsburg North and Williamsburg South together send over 167 students to a university, then their district will receive more education funding.

Based on the average number of students Williamsburg North and Williamsburg South each send to a university per year, their district rarely receives more education funding.","We will show you how many students the two schools sent to a university over 40 years in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual years. For each year, you will be asked whether the Williamsburg district received more funding.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many students are sent to a university by each school on average."]
learning: {"stim1":"Williamsburg North sent ","stim2":" to a university.","stim3":"Williamsburg South sent ","stim4":" to a university.","question":"Did the district receive more funding this year?","alert":"Remember that the district will receive more funding whenever Williamsburg North and Williamsburg South send more than 167 students to a university in total."}
man_check: {"c":"On average, how many students does Williamsburg North send to a university each year?","a":"On average, how many students does Williamsburg South send to a university each year?"}
judgment: {"reminder":"As a reminder, the district will receive more funding for education if Williamsburg North and Williamsburg South together send over 167 students to a university.","vignette":"This year, Williamsburg North sent 84 students to a university and Williamsburg South sent 84 students to a university. Together, they sent 168 students to a university. So, the Williamsburg district received more funding.","statement":"Williamsburg North sending 84 students to a university caused the district to receive more funding this year."}
